name: @multyr/subgraphs
description: The Graph subgraphs for Multyr vault ecosystem across Ethereum, Arbitrum, and Base

scripts.postinstall: npm run extract-abis || echo 'ABI extraction skipped (run forge build first if needed)'
scripts.codegen:all: npm run codegen:eth && npm run codegen:arb && npm run codegen:base
scripts.build:all: npm run build:eth && npm run build:arb && npm run build:base
scripts.test:all: npm run test:eth && npm run test:arb && npm run test:base
scripts.test:subgraph: npm run codegen:all && npm run build:all
